title: hieracium froelichianum subsp. subtenellipes
intro: Hieracium froelichianum subsp. subtenellipes is a plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium, commonly found in mountainous regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and sesquiterpenes, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, contributing to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Hieracium froelichianum subsp. subtenellipes can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
